title: Penza, Penza Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Penza, Penza Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Penza is a city in Penza Oblast with a population of 520,000. A city on the Sura River, a cultural and industrial center with a well-preserved 19th-century city center and a growing IT sector.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
